                  |L28.162|
0000a2  f8840046          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;1060
0000a6  e7f4              B        |L28.146|
;;;1066   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_OCN_Stop_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_OCN_Stop_IT PROC
;;;796      */
;;;797    HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_OCN_Stop_IT(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;798    {
000002  000d              MOVS     r5,r1
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;799      HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
000006  f04f0600          MOV      r6,#0
00000a  d005              BEQ      |L29.24|
;;;800      uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;801    
;;;802      /* Check the parameters */
;;;803      assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;804    
;;;805      switch (Channel)
00000c  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00000e  d008              BEQ      |L29.34|
000010  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
000012  d00b              BEQ      |L29.44|
;;;806      {
;;;807        case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;808        {
;;;809          /* Disable the TIM Output Compare interrupt */
;;;810          __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC1);
;;;811          break;
;;;812        }
;;;813    
;;;814        case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;815        {
;;;816          /* Disable the TIM Output Compare interrupt */
;;;817          __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC2);
;;;818          break;
;;;819        }
;;;820    
;;;821        case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;822        {
;;;823          /* Disable the TIM Output Compare interrupt */
;;;824          __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC3);
;;;825          break;
;;;826        }
;;;827    
;;;828        default:
;;;829          status = HAL_ERROR;
000014  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;830          break;
000016  e03d              B        |L29.148|
                  |L29.24|
000018  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;810
00001a  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;810
00001c  f0210102          BIC      r1,r1,#2              ;810
000020  e008              B        |L29.52|
                  |L29.34|
000022  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;817
000024  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;817
000026  f0210104          BIC      r1,r1,#4              ;817
00002a  e003              B        |L29.52|
                  |L29.44|
00002c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;824
00002e  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;824
000030  f0210108          BIC      r1,r1,#8              ;824
                  |L29.52|
000034  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;824
;;;831      }
;;;832    
;;;833      if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;834      {
;;;835        /* Disable the Capture compare channel N */
;;;836        TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_DISABLE);
000036  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000038  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00003a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
;;;837    
;;;838        /* Disable the TIM Break interrupt (only if no more channel is active) */
;;;839        tmpccer = htim->Instance->CCER;
000040  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000042  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;840        if ((tmpccer & (TIM_CCER_CC1NE | TIM_CCER_CC2NE | TIM_CCER_CC3NE)) == (uint32_t)RESET)
000044  f2404144          MOV      r1,#0x444
000048  420a              TST      r2,r1
00004a  d103              BNE      |L29.84|
;;;841        {
;;;842          __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_BREAK);
00004c  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
00004e  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
000052  60c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
                  |L29.84|
;;;843        }
;;;844    
;;;845        /* Disable the Main Output */
;;;846        __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);
000054  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000056  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000058  f2411211          MOV      r2,#0x1111
00005c  4213              TST      r3,r2
00005e  d106              BNE      |L29.110|
000060  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000062  420b              TST      r3,r1
000064  d103              BNE      |L29.110|
000066  6c43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
000068  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
00006c  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L29.110|
;;;847    
;;;848        /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;849        __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
00006e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000070  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000072  4213              TST      r3,r2
000074  d106              BNE      |L29.132|
000076  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000078  420a              TST      r2,r1
00007a  d103              BNE      |L29.132|
00007c  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00007e  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
000082  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L29.132|
000084  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;829
;;;850    
;;;851        /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;852        TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000086  b13d              CBZ      r5,|L29.152|
000088  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00008a  d008              BEQ      |L29.158|
00008c  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
00008e  d009              BEQ      |L29.164|
000090  f8840047          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L29.148|
;;;853      }
;;;854    
;;;855      /* Return function status */
;;;856      return status;
000094  4630              MOV      r0,r6
;;;857    }
000096  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L29.152|
000098  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;852
00009c  e7fa              B        |L29.148|
                  |L29.158|
00009e  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;852
0000a2  e7f7              B        |L29.148|
                  |L29.164|
0000a4  f8840046          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;852
0000a8  e7f4              B        |L29.148|
;;;858    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start PROC
;;;1582     */
;;;1583   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t OutputChannel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1584   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  b159              CBZ      r1,|L30.30|
;;;1585     uint32_t input_channel = (OutputChannel == TIM_CHANNEL_1) ? TIM_CHANNEL_2 : TIM_CHANNEL_1;
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L30.8|
;;;1586     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef channel_1_state = TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1);
000008  f894603e          LDRB     r6,[r4,#0x3e]
;;;1587     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef channel_2_state = TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2);
00000c  f894303f          LDRB     r3,[r4,#0x3f]
;;;1588     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef complementary_channel_1_state = TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1);
000010  f8942044          LDRB     r2,[r4,#0x44]
;;;1589     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef complementary_channel_2_state = TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2);
000014  f8940045          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]
;;;1590   
;;;1591     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1592     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, OutputChannel));
;;;1593   
;;;1594     /* Check the TIM channels state */
;;;1595     if ((channel_1_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000018  2e01              CMP      r6,#1
00001a  d108              BNE      |L30.46|
00001c  e001              B        |L30.34|
                  |L30.30|
00001e  2504              MOVS     r5,#4                 ;1585
000020  e7f2              B        |L30.8|
                  |L30.34|
;;;1596         || (channel_2_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000022  2b01              CMP      r3,#1
000024  d103              BNE      |L30.46|
;;;1597         || (complementary_channel_1_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000026  2a01              CMP      r2,#1
000028  d101              BNE      |L30.46|
;;;1598         || (complementary_channel_2_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY))
00002a  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00002c  d001              BEQ      |L30.50|
                  |L30.46|
;;;1599     {
;;;1600       return HAL_ERROR;
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1601     }
;;;1602   
;;;1603     /* Set the TIM channels state */
;;;1604     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1605     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1606     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1607     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1608   
;;;1609     /* Enable the complementary One Pulse output channel and the Input Capture channel */
;;;1610     TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, OutputChannel, TIM_CCxN_ENABLE);
;;;1611     TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, input_channel, TIM_CCx_ENABLE);
;;;1612   
;;;1613     /* Enable the Main Output */
;;;1614     __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1615   
;;;1616     /* Return function status */
;;;1617     return HAL_OK;
;;;1618   }
000030  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L30.50|
000032  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1604
000034  f884003e          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3e]         ;1604
000038  f884003f          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3f]         ;1605
00003c  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1606
000040  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1607
000044  2204              MOVS     r2,#4                 ;1610
000046  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1610
000048  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
00004c  2201              MOVS     r2,#1                 ;1611
00004e  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;1611
000050  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1611
000052  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxChannelCmd
000056  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1614
000058  6c41              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x44]         ;1614
00005a  f4414100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x8000         ;1614
00005e  6441              STR      r1,[r0,#0x44]         ;1614
000060  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1617
000062  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1619   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start_IT PROC
;;;1670     */
;;;1671   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Start_IT(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t OutputChannel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1672   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  b159              CBZ      r1,|L31.30|
;;;1673     uint32_t input_channel = (OutputChannel == TIM_CHANNEL_1) ? TIM_CHANNEL_2 : TIM_CHANNEL_1;
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L31.8|
;;;1674     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef channel_1_state = TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1);
000008  f894603e          LDRB     r6,[r4,#0x3e]
;;;1675     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef channel_2_state = TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2);
00000c  f894303f          LDRB     r3,[r4,#0x3f]
;;;1676     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef complementary_channel_1_state = TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1);
000010  f8942044          LDRB     r2,[r4,#0x44]
;;;1677     HAL_TIM_ChannelStateTypeDef complementary_channel_2_state = TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2);
000014  f8940045          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]
;;;1678   
;;;1679     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1680     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, OutputChannel));
;;;1681   
;;;1682     /* Check the TIM channels state */
;;;1683     if ((channel_1_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000018  2e01              CMP      r6,#1
00001a  d108              BNE      |L31.46|
00001c  e001              B        |L31.34|
                  |L31.30|
00001e  2504              MOVS     r5,#4                 ;1673
000020  e7f2              B        |L31.8|
                  |L31.34|
;;;1684         || (channel_2_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000022  2b01              CMP      r3,#1
000024  d103              BNE      |L31.46|
;;;1685         || (complementary_channel_1_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000026  2a01              CMP      r2,#1
000028  d101              BNE      |L31.46|
;;;1686         || (complementary_channel_2_state != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY))
00002a  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00002c  d001              BEQ      |L31.50|
                  |L31.46|
;;;1687     {
;;;1688       return HAL_ERROR;
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1689     }
;;;1690   
;;;1691     /* Set the TIM channels state */
;;;1692     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1693     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1694     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1695     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1696   
;;;1697     /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 interrupt */
;;;1698     __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC1);
;;;1699   
;;;1700     /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 interrupt */
;;;1701     __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC2);
;;;1702   
;;;1703     /* Enable the complementary One Pulse output channel and the Input Capture channel */
;;;1704     TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, OutputChannel, TIM_CCxN_ENABLE);
;;;1705     TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, input_channel, TIM_CCx_ENABLE);
;;;1706   
;;;1707     /* Enable the Main Output */
;;;1708     __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1709   
;;;1710     /* Return function status */
;;;1711     return HAL_OK;
;;;1712   }
000030  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L31.50|
000032  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1692
000034  f884003e          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3e]         ;1692
000038  f884003f          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3f]         ;1693
00003c  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1694
000040  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1695
000044  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1698
000046  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1698
000048  f0420202          ORR      r2,r2,#2              ;1698
00004c  60c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1698
00004e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1701
000050  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1701
000052  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4              ;1701
000056  60c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1701
000058  2204              MOVS     r2,#4                 ;1704
00005a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1704
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
000060  2201              MOVS     r2,#1                 ;1705
000062  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;1705
000064  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1705
000066  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxChannelCmd
00006a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1708
00006c  6c41              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x44]         ;1708
00006e  f4414100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x8000         ;1708
000072  6441              STR      r1,[r0,#0x44]         ;1708
000074  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1711
000076  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1713

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Stop||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Stop PROC
;;;1631     */
;;;1632   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_OnePulseN_Stop(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t OutputChannel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1633   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  b359              CBZ      r1,|L32.94|
;;;1634     uint32_t input_channel = (OutputChannel == TIM_CHANNEL_1) ? TIM_CHANNEL_2 : TIM_CHANNEL_1;
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L32.8|
;;;1635   
;;;1636     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1637     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, OutputChannel));
;;;1638   
;;;1639     /* Disable the complementary One Pulse output channel and the Input Capture channel */
;;;1640     TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, OutputChannel, TIM_CCxN_DISABLE);

;;;1641     TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, input_channel, TIM_CCx_DISABLE);

;;;1644     __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);

000024  f2404244          MOV      r2,#0x444
000028  d106              BNE      |L32.56|
00002a  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
00002c  4213              TST      r3,r2
00002e  d103              BNE      |L32.56|
000030  6c43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
000032  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
000036  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L32.56|
;;;1645   
;;;1646     /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;1647     __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
000038  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00003a  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
00003c  420b              TST      r3,r1
00003e  d106              BNE      |L32.78|
000040  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000042  4211              TST      r1,r2
000044  d103              BNE      |L32.78|
000046  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
000048  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
00004c  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L32.78|
;;;1648   
;;;1649     /* Set the TIM  channels state */
;;;1650     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00004e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000050  f8040f3e          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3e]!
;;;1651     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000054  7060              STRB     r0,[r4,#1]
;;;1652     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000056  71a0              STRB     r0,[r4,#6]
;;;1653     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000058  71e0              STRB     r0,[r4,#7]
;;;1654   
;;;1655     /* Return function status */
;;;1656     return HAL_OK;
00005a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1657   }
00005c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L32.94|
00005e  2504              MOVS     r5,#4                 ;1634
000060  e7d2              B        |L32.8|
;;;1658   
                          ENDP

;;;1727   {

;;;1731     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, OutputChannel));

;;;1741     TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, input_channel, TIM_CCx_DISABLE);

000028  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxChannelCmd

;;;1744     __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);

000042  d103              BNE      |L33.76|

000046  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
00004a  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L33.76|
;;;1745   
;;;1746     /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;1747     __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
00004c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00004e  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000050  420b              TST      r3,r1
000052  d106              BNE      |L33.98|
000054  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000056  4211              TST      r1,r2
000058  d103              BNE      |L33.98|
00005a  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00005c  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
000060  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L33.98|
;;;1748

;;;1750     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);

;;;1751     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000068  7060              STRB     r0,[r4,#1]
;;;1752     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00006a  71a0              STRB     r0,[r4,#6]
;;;1753     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);

;;;1754   
;;;1755     /* Return function status */
;;;1756     return HAL_OK;
00006e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1757   }

                  |L33.116|

;;;1758

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start PROC
;;;1110     */
;;;1111   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1112   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1113     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;1114   
;;;1115     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1116     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1117   
;;;1118     /* Check the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1119     if (TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
;;;1120     {
;;;1121       return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1122     }
;;;1123   
;;;1124     /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1125     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
000004  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000006  b149              CBZ      r1,|L34.28|
000008  2904              CMP      r1,#4                 ;1119
00000a  d00e              BEQ      |L34.42|
00000c  2908              CMP      r1,#8                 ;1119
00000e  d013              BEQ      |L34.56|
000010  f8940047          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]         ;1119
000014  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;1119
000016  d016              BEQ      |L34.70|
                  |L34.24|
000018  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1121
;;;1126   
;;;1127     /* Enable the complementary PWM output  */
;;;1128     TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_ENABLE);
;;;1129   
;;;1130     /* Enable the Main Output */
;;;1131     __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1132   
;;;1133     /* Enable the Peripheral, except in trigger mode where enable is automatically done with trigger */
;;;1134     if (IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance))
;;;1135     {
;;;1136       tmpsmcr = htim->Instance->SMCR & TIM_SMCR_SMS;
;;;1137       if (!IS_TIM_SLAVEMODE_TRIGGER_ENABLED(tmpsmcr))
;;;1138       {
;;;1139         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1140       }
;;;1141     }
;;;1142     else
;;;1143     {
;;;1144       __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1145     }
;;;1146   
;;;1147     /* Return function status */
;;;1148     return HAL_OK;
;;;1149   }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L34.28|

000024  f8842044          STRB     r2,[r4,#0x44]         ;1125

                  |L34.42|

000056  f4414100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x8000         ;1131

;;;1150   
                          ENDP

                  |L34.140|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L34.144|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L34.148|

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_DMA||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_DMA PROC
;;;1353     */
;;;1354   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_DMA(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel, const uint32_t *pData,
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1355                                              uint16_t Length)
;;;1356   {
000004  4617              MOV      r7,r2
000006  000d              MOVS     r5,r1
000008  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1357     HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
00000a  f04f0600          MOV      r6,#0
00000e  d00c              BEQ      |L35.42|
;;;1358     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;1359   
;;;1360     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1361     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1362   
;;;1363     /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1364     if (TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) == HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY)
000010  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000012  d011              BEQ      |L35.56|
000014  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
000016  d016              BEQ      |L35.70|

00001c  2802              CMP      r0,#2
00001e  d019              BEQ      |L35.84|
;;;1365     {
;;;1366       return HAL_BUSY;
;;;1367     }
;;;1368     else if (TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) == HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000020  f8940047          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L35.36|
000024  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000026  d018              BEQ      |L35.90|
000028  e05a              B        |L35.224|
                  |L35.42|
00002a  f8940044          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1364
00002e  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;1364
000030  d010              BEQ      |L35.84|
000032  f8940044          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]
000036  e7f5              B        |L35.36|
                  |L35.56|
000038  f8940045          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1364
00003c  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;1364
00003e  d009              BEQ      |L35.84|
000040  f8940045          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]
000044  e7ee              B        |L35.36|
                  |L35.70|
000046  f8940046          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;1364
00004a  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;1364
00004c  d002              BEQ      |L35.84|
00004e  f8940046          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]
000052  e7e7              B        |L35.36|
                  |L35.84|
000054  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1366
                  |L35.86|
;;;1369     {
;;;1370       if ((pData == NULL) || (Length == 0U))
;;;1371       {
;;;1372         return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1373       }
;;;1374       else
;;;1375       {
;;;1376         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1377       }
;;;1378     }
;;;1379     else
;;;1380     {
;;;1381       return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1382     }
;;;1383   
;;;1384     switch (Channel)
;;;1385     {
;;;1386       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1387       {
;;;1388         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1389         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt;
;;;1390         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1391   
;;;1392         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1393         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAErrorCCxN ;
;;;1394   
;;;1395         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1396         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR1,
;;;1397                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1398         {
;;;1399           /* Return error status */
;;;1400           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1401         }
;;;1402         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 DMA request */
;;;1403         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC1);
;;;1404         break;
;;;1405       }
;;;1406   
;;;1407       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1408       {
;;;1409         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1410         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt;
;;;1411         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1412   
;;;1413         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1414         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAErrorCCxN ;
;;;1415   
;;;1416         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1417         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR2,
;;;1418                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1419         {
;;;1420           /* Return error status */
;;;1421           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1422         }
;;;1423         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 DMA request */
;;;1424         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC2);
;;;1425         break;
;;;1426       }
;;;1427   
;;;1428       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1429       {
;;;1430         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1431         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt;
;;;1432         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1433   
;;;1434         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1435         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAErrorCCxN ;
;;;1436   
;;;1437         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1438         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR3,
;;;1439                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1440         {
;;;1441           /* Return error status */
;;;1442           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1443         }
;;;1444         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 3 DMA request */
;;;1445         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC3);
;;;1446         break;
;;;1447       }
;;;1448   
;;;1449       default:
;;;1450         status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;1451         break;
;;;1452     }
;;;1453   
;;;1454     if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;1455     {
;;;1456       /* Enable the complementary PWM output  */
;;;1457       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_ENABLE);
;;;1458   
;;;1459       /* Enable the Main Output */
;;;1460       __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1461   
;;;1462       /* Enable the Peripheral, except in trigger mode where enable is automatically done with trigger */
;;;1463       if (IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance))
;;;1464       {
;;;1465         tmpsmcr = htim->Instance->SMCR & TIM_SMCR_SMS;
;;;1466         if (!IS_TIM_SLAVEMODE_TRIGGER_ENABLED(tmpsmcr))
;;;1467         {
;;;1468           __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1469         }
;;;1470       }
;;;1471       else
;;;1472       {
;;;1473         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1474       }
;;;1475     }
;;;1476   
;;;1477     /* Return function status */
;;;1478     return status;
;;;1479   }
000056  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
                  |L35.90|

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_IT PROC
;;;1192     */
;;;1193   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Start_IT(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1194   {
;;;1195     HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
000002  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;1194
;;;1196     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;1197   
;;;1198     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1199     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1200   
;;;1201     /* Check the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1202     if (TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) != HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
;;;1203     {
;;;1204       return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1205     }
;;;1206   
;;;1207     /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1208     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
000006  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000008  b149              CBZ      r1,|L36.30|
00000a  2904              CMP      r1,#4                 ;1202
00000c  d012              BEQ      |L36.52|
00000e  2908              CMP      r1,#8                 ;1202
000010  d041              BEQ      |L36.150|
000012  f8940047          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]         ;1202
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;1202
000018  d048              BEQ      |L36.172|
                  |L36.26|
00001a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1204
;;;1209   
;;;1210     switch (Channel)
;;;1211     {
;;;1212       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1213       {
;;;1214         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 interrupt */
;;;1215         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC1);
;;;1216         break;
;;;1217       }
;;;1218   
;;;1219       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1220       {
;;;1221         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 interrupt */
;;;1222         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC2);
;;;1223         break;
;;;1224       }
;;;1225   
;;;1226       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1227       {
;;;1228         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 3 interrupt */
;;;1229         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC3);
;;;1230         break;
;;;1231       }
;;;1232   
;;;1233       default:
;;;1234         status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;1235         break;
;;;1236     }
;;;1237   
;;;1238     if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;1239     {
;;;1240       /* Enable the TIM Break interrupt */
;;;1241       __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_BREAK);
;;;1242   
;;;1243       /* Enable the complementary PWM output  */
;;;1244       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_ENABLE);
;;;1245   
;;;1246       /* Enable the Main Output */
;;;1247       __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1248   
;;;1249       /* Enable the Peripheral, except in trigger mode where enable is automatically done with trigger */
;;;1250       if (IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance))
;;;1251       {
;;;1252         tmpsmcr = htim->Instance->SMCR & TIM_SMCR_SMS;
;;;1253         if (!IS_TIM_SLAVEMODE_TRIGGER_ENABLED(tmpsmcr))
;;;1254         {
;;;1255           __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1256         }
;;;1257       }
;;;1258       else
;;;1259       {
;;;1260         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1261       }
;;;1262     }
;;;1263   
;;;1264     /* Return function status */
;;;1265     return status;
;;;1266   }

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop PROC
;;;1160     */
;;;1161   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1162   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1163     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1164     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1165   
;;;1166     /* Disable the complementary PWM output  */
;;;1167     TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_DISABLE);
000006  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000008  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
;;;1168   
;;;1169     /* Disable the Main Output */
;;;1170     __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);
00000e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000010  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000012  f2411111          MOV      r1,#0x1111
000016  420b              TST      r3,r1
000018  f2404244          MOV      r2,#0x444
00001c  d106              BNE      |L37.44|
00001e  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000020  4213              TST      r3,r2
000022  d103              BNE      |L37.44|
000024  6c43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
000026  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
00002a  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L37.44|
;;;1171   
;;;1172     /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;1173     __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
00002c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00002e  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000030  420b              TST      r3,r1
000032  d106              BNE      |L37.66|
000034  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000036  4211              TST      r1,r2
000038  d103              BNE      |L37.66|
00003a  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00003c  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
000040  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L37.66|
;;;1174   
;;;1175     /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1176     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000042  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000044  b13d              CBZ      r5,|L37.86|
000046  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000048  d008              BEQ      |L37.92|
00004a  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
00004c  d009              BEQ      |L37.98|
00004e  f8840047          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L37.82|
;;;1177   
;;;1178     /* Return function status */
;;;1179     return HAL_OK;
000052  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1180   }
000054  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L37.86|
000056  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1176
00005a  e7fa              B        |L37.82|
                  |L37.92|
00005c  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1176
000060  e7f7              B        |L37.82|
                  |L37.98|
000062  f8840046          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;1176
000066  e7f4              B        |L37.82|
;;;1181   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_DMA||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_DMA PROC
;;;1491     */
;;;1492   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_DMA(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1493   {
000002  000d              MOVS     r5,r1
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1494     HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
000006  f04f0600          MOV      r6,#0
00000a  d005              BEQ      |L38.24|
;;;1495   
;;;1496     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1497     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1498   
;;;1499     switch (Channel)
00000c  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00000e  d00a              BEQ      |L38.38|
000010  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
000012  d00f              BEQ      |L38.52|
;;;1500     {
;;;1501       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1502       {
;;;1503         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 DMA request */
;;;1504         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC1);
;;;1505         (void)HAL_DMA_Abort_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]);
;;;1506         break;
;;;1507       }
;;;1508   
;;;1509       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1510       {
;;;1511         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 DMA request */
;;;1512         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC2);
;;;1513         (void)HAL_DMA_Abort_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]);
;;;1514         break;
;;;1515       }
;;;1516   
;;;1517       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1518       {
;;;1519         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 3 DMA request */
;;;1520         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC3);
;;;1521         (void)HAL_DMA_Abort_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]);
;;;1522         break;
;;;1523       }
;;;1524   
;;;1525       default:
;;;1526         status = HAL_ERROR;
000014  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1527         break;
000016  e03c              B        |L38.146|
                  |L38.24|
000018  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1504
00001a  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1504
00001c  f4217100          BIC      r1,r1,#0x200          ;1504
000020  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1504
000022  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]         ;1506
000024  e00c              B        |L38.64|
                  |L38.38|
000026  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1512
000028  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1512
00002a  f4216180          BIC      r1,r1,#0x400          ;1512
00002e  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1512
000030  6aa0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x28]         ;1514
000032  e005              B        |L38.64|
                  |L38.52|
000034  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1520
000036  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1520
000038  f4216100          BIC      r1,r1,#0x800          ;1520
00003c  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1520
00003e  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]         ;1521
                  |L38.64|
000040  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_DMA_Abort_IT
;;;1528     }
;;;1529   
;;;1530     if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;1531     {
;;;1532       /* Disable the complementary PWM output */
;;;1533       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_DISABLE);
000044  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000046  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000048  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
;;;1534   
;;;1535       /* Disable the Main Output */
;;;1536       __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);
00004e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000050  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000052  f2411111          MOV      r1,#0x1111
000056  420b              TST      r3,r1
000058  f2404244          MOV      r2,#0x444
00005c  d106              BNE      |L38.108|
00005e  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000060  4213              TST      r3,r2
000062  d103              BNE      |L38.108|
000064  6c43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
000066  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
00006a  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L38.108|
;;;1537   
;;;1538       /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;1539       __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
00006c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00006e  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000070  420b              TST      r3,r1
000072  d106              BNE      |L38.130|
000074  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000076  4211              TST      r1,r2
000078  d103              BNE      |L38.130|
00007a  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00007c  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
000080  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L38.130|
000082  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1526
;;;1540   
;;;1541       /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1542       TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000084  b13d              CBZ      r5,|L38.150|
000086  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000088  d008              BEQ      |L38.156|
00008a  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
00008c  d009              BEQ      |L38.162|
00008e  f8840047          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L38.146|
;;;1543     }
;;;1544   
;;;1545     /* Return function status */
;;;1546     return status;
000092  4630              MOV      r0,r6
;;;1547   }
000094  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L38.150|
000096  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1542
00009a  e7fa              B        |L38.146|
                  |L38.156|
00009c  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1542
0000a0  e7f7              B        |L38.146|
                  |L38.162|
0000a2  f8840046          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;1542
0000a6  e7f4              B        |L38.146|
;;;1548   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_IT PROC
;;;1278     */
;;;1279   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_PWMN_Stop_IT(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1280   {
000002  000d              MOVS     r5,r1
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1281     HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
000006  f04f0600          MOV      r6,#0
00000a  d005              BEQ      |L39.24|
;;;1282     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;1283   
;;;1284     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1285     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1286   
;;;1287     switch (Channel)
00000c  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00000e  d008              BEQ      |L39.34|
000010  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
000012  d00b              BEQ      |L39.44|
;;;1288     {
;;;1289       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1290       {
;;;1291         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 interrupt */
;;;1292         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC1);
;;;1293         break;
;;;1294       }
;;;1295   
;;;1296       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1297       {
;;;1298         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 interrupt */
;;;1299         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC2);
;;;1300         break;
;;;1301       }
;;;1302   
;;;1303       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1304       {
;;;1305         /* Disable the TIM Capture/Compare 3 interrupt */
;;;1306         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC3);
;;;1307         break;
;;;1308       }
;;;1309   
;;;1310       default:
;;;1311         status = HAL_ERROR;
000014  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
;;;1312         break;
000016  e03d              B        |L39.148|
                  |L39.24|
000018  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1292
00001a  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1292
00001c  f0210102          BIC      r1,r1,#2              ;1292
000020  e008              B        |L39.52|
                  |L39.34|
000022  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1299
000024  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1299
000026  f0210104          BIC      r1,r1,#4              ;1299
00002a  e003              B        |L39.52|
                  |L39.44|
00002c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1306
00002e  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1306
000030  f0210108          BIC      r1,r1,#8              ;1306
                  |L39.52|
000034  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;1306
;;;1313     }
;;;1314   
;;;1315     if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;1316     {
;;;1317       /* Disable the complementary PWM output  */
;;;1318       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCxN_DISABLE);
000036  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000038  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00003a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_CCxNChannelCmd
;;;1319   
;;;1320       /* Disable the TIM Break interrupt (only if no more channel is active) */
;;;1321       tmpccer = htim->Instance->CCER;
000040  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000042  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;1322       if ((tmpccer & (TIM_CCER_CC1NE | TIM_CCER_CC2NE | TIM_CCER_CC3NE)) == (uint32_t)RESET)
000044  f2404144          MOV      r1,#0x444
000048  420a              TST      r2,r1
00004a  d103              BNE      |L39.84|
;;;1323       {
;;;1324         __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_BREAK);
00004c  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
00004e  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
000052  60c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
                  |L39.84|
;;;1325       }
;;;1326   
;;;1327       /* Disable the Main Output */
;;;1328       __HAL_TIM_MOE_DISABLE(htim);
000054  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000056  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000058  f2411211          MOV      r2,#0x1111
00005c  4213              TST      r3,r2
00005e  d106              BNE      |L39.110|
000060  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000062  420b              TST      r3,r1
000064  d103              BNE      |L39.110|
000066  6c43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
000068  f4234300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x8000
00006c  6443              STR      r3,[r0,#0x44]
                  |L39.110|
;;;1329   
;;;1330       /* Disable the Peripheral */
;;;1331       __HAL_TIM_DISABLE(htim);
00006e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000070  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000072  4213              TST      r3,r2
000074  d106              BNE      |L39.132|
000076  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000078  420a              TST      r2,r1
00007a  d103              BNE      |L39.132|
00007c  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00007e  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
000082  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
                  |L39.132|
000084  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1311
;;;1332   
;;;1333       /* Set the TIM complementary channel state */
;;;1334       TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000086  b13d              CBZ      r5,|L39.152|
000088  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00008a  d008              BEQ      |L39.158|
00008c  2d08              CMP      r5,#8
00008e  d009              BEQ      |L39.164|
000090  f8840047          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L39.148|
;;;1335     }
;;;1336   
;;;1337     /* Return function status */
;;;1338     return status;
000094  4630              MOV      r0,r6
;;;1339   }
000096  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L39.152|
000098  f8840044          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x44]         ;1334
00009c  e7fa              B        |L39.148|
                  |L39.158|
00009e  f8840045          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x45]         ;1334
0000a2  e7f7              B        |L39.148|
                  |L39.164|
0000a4  f8840046          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x46]         ;1334
0000a8  e7f4              B        |L39.148|
;;;1340   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIMEx_RemapConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_TIMEx_RemapConfig PROC
;;;2458     */
;;;2459   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIMEx_RemapConfig(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Remap)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2460   {
;;;2461     uint32_t tmpor1;
;;;2462     uint32_t tmpor2;
;;;2463   
;;;2464     /* Check parameters */
;;;2465     assert_param(IS_TIM_REMAP_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;2466     assert_param(IS_TIM_REMAP(Remap));
;;;2467   
;;;2468     __HAL_LOCK(htim);
000002  f890203c          LDRB     r2,[r0,#0x3c]
000006  2a01              CMP      r2,#1
000008  d00a              BEQ      |L40.32|
00000a  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00000c  f880203c          STRB     r2,[r0,#0x3c]
;;;2469   
;;;2470     /* Set ETR_SEL bit field (if required) */
;;;2471     if (IS_TIM_ETRSEL_INSTANCE(htim->Instance))
000010  4b0c              LDR      r3,|L40.68|
000012  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000014  429a              CMP      r2,r3
000016  d005              BEQ      |L40.36|
000018  f1b24f80          CMP      r2,#0x40000000
00001c  d002              BEQ      |L40.36|
00001e  e008              B        |L40.50|
                  |L40.32|
000020  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;2468
;;;2472     {
;;;2473       tmpor2 = htim->Instance->OR2;
;;;2474       tmpor2 &= ~TIM1_OR2_ETRSEL_Msk;
;;;2475       tmpor2 |= (Remap & TIM1_OR2_ETRSEL_Msk);
;;;2476   
;;;2477       /* Set TIMx_OR2 */
;;;2478       htim->Instance->OR2 = tmpor2;
;;;2479     }
;;;2480   
;;;2481     /* Set other remapping capabilities */
;;;2482     tmpor1 = Remap;
;;;2483     tmpor1 &= ~TIM1_OR2_ETRSEL_Msk;
;;;2484   
;;;2485     /* Set TIMx_OR1 */
;;;2486     htim->Instance->OR1 = tmpor1;
;;;2487   
;;;2488     __HAL_UNLOCK(htim);
;;;2489   
;;;2490     return HAL_OK;
;;;2491   }
000022  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L40.36|
000024  6e13              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x60]         ;2473
000026  f42334e0          BIC      r4,r3,#0x1c000        ;2474
00002a  f40133e0          AND      r3,r1,#0x1c000        ;2475
00002e  4323              ORRS     r3,r3,r4              ;2475
000030  6613              STR      r3,[r2,#0x60]         ;2478
                  |L40.50|
000032  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]            ;2486
000034  f42131e0          BIC      r1,r1,#0x1c000        ;2483
000038  6511              STR      r1,[r2,#0x50]         ;2486
00003a  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;2488
00003c  f880103c          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x3c]         ;2488
000040  4608              MOV      r0,r1                 ;2490
000042  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2492   
                          ENDP

                  |L40.68|
                          DCD      0x40012c00

                          AREA ||i.TIMEx_DMACommutationCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIMEx_DMACommutationCplt PROC
;;;2674     */
;;;2675   void TIMEx_DMACommutationCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2676   {
;;;2677     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
000002  6a80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x28]
;;;2678   
;;;2679     /* Change the htim state */
;;;2680     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  f880103d          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x3d]
;;;2681   
;;;2682   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2683     htim->CommutationCallback(htim);
;;;2684   #else
;;;2685     HAL_TIMEx_CommutCallback(htim);
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIMEx_CommutCallback
;;;2686   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2687   }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2688   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIMEx_DMACommutationHalfCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIMEx_DMACommutationHalfCplt PROC
;;;2693     */
;;;2694   void TIMEx_DMACommutationHalfCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2695   {
;;;2696     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
000002  6a80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x28]
;;;2697   
;;;2698     /* Change the htim state */
;;;2699     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  f880103d          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x3d]
;;;2700   
;;;2701   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2702     htim->CommutationHalfCpltCallback(htim);
;;;2703   #else
;;;2704     HAL_TIMEx_CommutHalfCpltCallback(htim);
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIMEx_CommutHalfCpltCallback
;;;2705   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2706   }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2707   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_CCxNChannelCmd||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_CCxNChannelCmd PROC
;;;2817     */
;;;2818   static void TIM_CCxNChannelCmd(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t Channel, uint32_t ChannelNState)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2819   {
;;;2820     uint32_t tmp;
;;;2821   
;;;2822     tmp = TIM_CCER_CC1NE << (Channel & 0x1FU); /* 0x1FU = 31 bits max shift */
000002  f001031f          AND      r3,r1,#0x1f
000006  2104              MOVS     r1,#4
;;;2823   
;;;2824     /* Reset the CCxNE Bit */
;;;2825     TIMx->CCER &=  ~tmp;
000008  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
00000a  4099              LSLS     r1,r1,r3              ;2822
00000c  438c              BICS     r4,r4,r1
00000e  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;2826   
;;;2827     /* Set or reset the CCxNE Bit */
;;;2828     TIMx->CCER |= (uint32_t)(ChannelNState << (Channel & 0x1FU)); /* 0x1FU = 31 bits max shift */
000010  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000012  409a              LSLS     r2,r2,r3
000014  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
000016  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;2829   }
000018  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2830   /**
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt PROC
;;;2713     */
;;;2714   static void TIM_DMADelayPulseNCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2715   {
;;;2716     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;2717   
;;;2718     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
;;;2719     {
;;;2720       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  6a62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x24]         ;2718
000008  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;2718
00000a  d105              BNE      |L44.24|
00000c  7721              STRB     r1,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2721   
;;;2722       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00000e  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000010  b9f8              CBNZ     r0,|L44.82|
;;;2723       {
;;;2724         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000012  f8841044          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x44]
000016  e01c              B        |L44.82|
                  |L44.24|
;;;2725       }
;;;2726     }
;;;2727     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
000018  6aa2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x28]
00001a  4282              CMP      r2,r0
00001c  d106              BNE      |L44.44|
;;;2728     {
;;;2729       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
00001e  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000020  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2730   
;;;2731       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000022  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000024  b9a8              CBNZ     r0,|L44.82|
;;;2732       {
;;;2733         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000026  f8841045          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x45]
00002a  e012              B        |L44.82|
                  |L44.44|
;;;2734       }
;;;2735     }
;;;2736     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
00002c  6ae2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x2c]
00002e  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000030  d106              BNE      |L44.64|
;;;2737     {
;;;2738       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
000032  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
000034  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2739   
;;;2740       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000036  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000038  b958              CBNZ     r0,|L44.82|
;;;2741       {
;;;2742         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00003a  f8841046          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x46]
00003e  e008              B        |L44.82|
                  |L44.64|
;;;2743       }
;;;2744     }
;;;2745     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])
000040  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]
000042  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000044  d105              BNE      |L44.82|
;;;2746     {
;;;2747       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;
000046  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
000048  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2748   
;;;2749       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00004a  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
00004c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L44.82|
;;;2750       {
;;;2751         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_4, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00004e  f8841047          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L44.82|
;;;2752       }
;;;2753     }
;;;2754     else
;;;2755     {
;;;2756       /* nothing to do */
;;;2757     }
;;;2758   
;;;2759   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2760     htim->PWM_PulseFinishedCallback(htim);
;;;2761   #else
;;;2762     HAL_TIM_PWM_PulseFinishedCallback(htim);

000054  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_PWM_PulseFinishedCallback
;;;2763   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2764   
;;;2765     htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_CLEARED;
000058  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00005a  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2766   }
00005c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2767   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMAErrorCCxN||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMAErrorCCxN PROC
;;;2772     */
;;;2773   static void TIM_DMAErrorCCxN(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2774   {
;;;2775     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;2776   
;;;2777     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
;;;2778     {
;;;2779       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  6a62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x24]         ;2777
000008  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;2777
00000a  d103              BNE      |L45.20|
00000c  7721              STRB     r1,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2780       TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00000e  f8841044          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x44]
000012  e00e              B        |L45.50|
                  |L45.20|
;;;2781     }
;;;2782     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
000014  6aa2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x28]
000016  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000018  d104              BNE      |L45.36|
;;;2783     {
;;;2784       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
00001a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00001c  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2785       TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00001e  f8841045          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x45]
000022  e006              B        |L45.50|
                  |L45.36|
;;;2786     }
;;;2787     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
000024  6ae2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x2c]
000026  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000028  d103              BNE      |L45.50|
;;;2788     {
;;;2789       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
00002a  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00002c  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2790       TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00002e  f8841046          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x46]
                  |L45.50|
;;;2791     }
;;;2792     else
;;;2793     {
;;;2794       /* nothing to do */
;;;2795     }
;;;2796   
;;;2797   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2798     htim->ErrorCallback(htim);
;;;2799   #else
;;;2800     HAL_TIM_ErrorCallback(htim);
000032  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000034  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_ErrorCallback
;;;2801   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2802

000038  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00003a  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;2804   }
00003c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;2805   
                          ENDP
